content.en:
"Once the Eternal Dao Seed is solidified, it will not be easy for the solidified part of the Eternal Dao Seed to improve!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although after solidification, the use of evil vines can also strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed, but the efficiency is at least ten times lower, but there is no risk of demon seeding.

Moreover, after solidification, the expansion of the Eternal Dao Seed is not to improve the quality of the Eternal Dao Seed, but to increase the quantity.

Therefore, it is best to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to a very powerful level, and then impact the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, which is the best way.

Knowing the secret of the breakthrough of the Eternal Realm God Realm, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

He will try his best to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to a certain limit, and then solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, so that if he breaks through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, his strength will increase greatly, and his potential will be able to be exerted to the limit.

"The Tree Heart Demon Seed won't help me much, let's use it for my son!"

Ye Tian called his son Ye Xingchen over.

Soon.

Ye Xingchen is here.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen said respectfully.

"Xingchen, this is the Tree Heart Demon Seed, use it for you now, and when your Eternal Dao Body is elevated to the Perfection Realm, then give it to your mother and sister. Ye Tian took out the Tree Heart Demon Seed from the Eternal Dao Seed and handed it to 827 Ye Xingchen.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen happily took it and integrated into his Eternal Dao Seed.

In an instant, he felt that his Eternal Dao Body had absorbed the energy transmitted by the Tree Heart Demon Seed, and began to rise rapidly.

"The Tree Demon Seed requires a lot of resources to cultivate, if you lack resources, just tell me. Ye Tian said.

"Father, I know!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen went to cultivate.

......

Without the Tree Heart Demon Seed, it would have little impact on Ye Tian.

The Tree Heart Demon Seed itself is not very helpful in strengthening the Eternal Dao Seed, its effect is to improve the Eternal Dao Body, and Ye Tian's current Eternal Dao Body itself has reached the consummation realm, and the Tree Heart Demon Seed is naturally not much use.

He can now be said to be able to obtain a treasure similar to the evil vine, which can be used to improve the Eternal Dao Seed, which can make his Eternal Dao Seed improve faster.

It's a pity that such a treasure is so rare, even the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm need it, and it is not easy for him to obtain.

"Maybe you can go to the Eternal Yin Wind Belt for a while!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This was one of the places where he knew there might be a treasure at the moment, and it was also the most promising.

The Eternal Yin Wind Belt is very dangerous, there are many Eternal Yin Spirits there, these Eternal Yin Spirits restrain the physical body, and only the Eternal Dao Seed Secret Technique can kill them, so the stronger the Eternal Dao Seed, the easier it is to deal with the Eternal Yin Spirit.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Species is very powerful, he has no problem dealing with the Eternal Yin Spirit, even if he encounters that kind of extremely terrifying Eternal Yin Spirit, it is a big deal to lose a copy body, and he can copy one at any time by copying the body.

And so this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came to the Eternal Yin Wind Belt.

Swish!

Ye Tian directly entered the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, and the Yin Wind Power invaded his body, but they were all resisted by his Perfect Eternal Dao Body.

"It's not a big problem!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he began to search for treasure resources in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt.

He also inquired that the Eternal Yin Wind Belt did have some resources, and if he was unlucky, he would be able to find treasures that would make the Eternal Realm God Realm feel excited.

However, the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm will hardly enter the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, firstly, the probability of finding that kind of opportunity is very low, and secondly, they are afraid of encountering an Eternal Yin Spirit comparable to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm.

That kind of Eternal Realm Divine Realm strength of the Eternal Yin Spirit can break the solidification of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, thereby affecting the Eternal Dao Seed of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, even if it will not be demonized, but if there is a problem with the Eternal Dao Realm, it is difficult to recover.

And with a flaw, if it is targeted by the enemy, there is a possibility of demon seeding.

Therefore, the Eternal Realm Divine Realm is not necessary, and it will not enter the Eternal Yin Wind Belt to break through, so it is not worth it at all.

(cfba)......

Soon.

Ye Tian encountered the Eternal Yin Spirit.

The speed of the Eternal Yin Spirit in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt is extremely fast, and it is really difficult to avoid the pursuit of the Eternal Yin Spirit, and only by escaping from the Eternal Yin Wind Belt can you avoid the pursuit.

Once they leave the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, no matter how powerful the Eternal Yin Spirit is, they can't chase it out.

The Eternal Yin Spirit is a creature that can only survive in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt.

This Dao Secret Technique was unleashed, and the Eternal Yin Spirits around them slowed down to the extreme one by one.

Then, the Spear of the Ruin Sun unleashed, piercing the body of an Eternal Yin Spirit and killing them.

An eternal yin spirit wanted to escape, and Ye Tian's right hand shook the void.

"Sun's Grip!"

The power of the Eternal Dao directly pinched the other party.

Boom!

This Eternal Yin Spirit was directly pinched and exploded by Ye Tian.

"These Eternal Yin Spirits are not powerful, and their strength is far inferior to mine!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He continues to explore the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, trying to find something good.

this day.

Ye Tian found a good thing-the Eternal Yin Spirit Stone.

This Eternal Yin Spirit Stone helps to refine the Eternal Dao Body, and the side effects are not too big, if it is sold, many Eternal Dao Realms will need it.

"Collect it, send it to the Terran Temple, and whoever wants it can redeem it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Time passes.

Ye Tian has gained a lot, but he really didn't find a few resources that were helpful to him, and none of them had much effect, he could only slightly improve the Eternal Dao Seed, which was far inferior to the effect of the Evil Vine.

"It's no wonder that those Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses don't come here to find resources, the resources here really can't attract them!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Gradually, thousands of years have passed.

He had found a lot of areas in the Eternal Yin Wind Belt, and he had also encountered the kind of Eternal Yin Spirit that was comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and was directly killed by the other party.

However, I still haven't found anything good.

He is not in a hurry, he just looks for it slowly, and he can always get a big catch.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian made a new discovery.

"The lair of the Eternal Yin Spirit!"

When Ye Tian came here, he saw hundreds of Eternal Yin Spirits, and he also sensed a breath similar to that of a demon seed, which was naturally not a real demon seed, a bit like the breath of an item like an evil vine.

"Even if it's not the Evil Vine Species, it's the Tree Heart Demon Seed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He fought his way into this lair, and saw the treasure as he was besieged by these eternal yin spirits.

It was a crimson flower, a little red and a little bewitching.

But Ye Tian was sure that this meaning was definitely similar to the evil vine.

"Gotta get your hands on it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
